name: Sweet and Sour Tofu#2
recipeIngredient: 1 Green and 1 red bell pepper, sliced into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut tofu into small cubes; set aside.
2. Combine lemon juice, tamari, water, tomato paste, honey, ginger, and garlic in a bowl. Mix until well blended.
3. Add tofu to the marinade, stir gently, and let marinate for several hours (or overnight).
4. Stir-fry scallions, bell peppers, and mushrooms in 2 tsp of oil. Cook until they are slightly tender.
5. Add tofu with the marinade to the pan. Lower heat and continue stirring until everything is hot and bubbly.
6. Remove from heat and stir in cashews.
7. Serve over rice.
